> Before opening a question issue, please check the [Discussions](https://github.com/getGanemo/workspace-cli/discussions) tab — most questions belong there. Use issues for questions only when you suspect a bug or undocumented behavior.

## Your question

Be specific. What did you try? What docs did you read? Where did you get stuck?

```
<commands you ran and their output>
```

## What you expected

What did you think was supposed to happen?
